title: Admin signs out
summary: Admin clicks 'Sign out' in the /admin nav. A POST form submits to /logout, which deletes the admin_session cookie and 303-redirects to /. POST (not GET) is intentional — it stops Next.js Link prefetch from accidentally logging the admin out.

steps.label: click Sign out
steps.note: <form action="/logout" method="POST"> wraps the button in the admin nav.

steps.label: POST /logout
steps.note: Browser submits the form to the POST route handler.
303 forces a GET on the redirect, which is the right pattern after a POST.
